title: Sunrun Reports Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Sunrun reported strong third-quarter 2024 results, becoming the first clean energy company to surpass 1 million residential solar customers. Storage installations reached 336.3 megawatt hours, representing 92% year-over-year growth with storage attachment rates reaching 60%, up dramatically from 33% in prior year. Solar energy capacity installed totaled 229.7 megawatts in Q3 with 7.3 gigawatts of total networked capacity deployed. Cash Generation reached $2.5 million (second consecutive quarter positive) with Net Subscriber Value reaching $14,632 per subscriber (highest company level). Revenue totaled $537.2 million (down 5% year-over-year) with net loss of $83.8 million or $0.37 per share. Management reiterated Cash Generation guidance of $350-$600 million for full-year 2025. The company reduced parent debt by over $100 million since March 2024 and extended its working capital facility maturity to March 2027. Notable developments include virtual power plant programs in New York, Maryland, and Texas, plus expansion of new homes partnerships with major builders.
